channel.title: Darren.dev — AI/ML Engineering Blog
channel.description: Technical tutorials, project breakdowns, and industry insights on AI, MLOps, and Data Engineering by Morris Darren Babu.

item.title: How I Built a Scalable REST API with FastAPI & Docker
item.description: A deep dive into designing, building, and deploying a production-grade REST API that handles 10K+ requests/sec.

item.title: Deploying ML Models with Docker & Kubernetes: A Complete Guide
item.description: From local development to production K8s cluster — the full journey of containerizing and orchestrating ML workloads.

item.title: Building Production RAG Pipelines: Lessons from Real Projects
item.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipelines that actually work in production — embeddings, chunking strategies, and evaluation.

item.title: MLOps Monitoring: Detecting Model Drift Before It's Too Late
item.description: How to build a comprehensive monitoring system that catches data drift, concept drift, and performance degradation.

item.title: Graph Neural Networks Explained: From Theory to PyTorch Implementation
item.description: Understanding GNNs through intuitive examples and building one from scratch with PyTorch Geometric.

item.title: Advanced Prompt Engineering: Techniques That Actually Work
item.description: Beyond 'act as X' — systematic approaches to prompt design including chain-of-thought, few-shot, and self-consistency.

item.title: CI/CD for Machine Learning: Automating the Entire Pipeline
item.description: How to set up GitHub Actions workflows that test, validate, and deploy ML models automatically on every push.

item.title: Vector Databases Deep Dive: Choosing the Right One for Your AI App
item.description: Comparing Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, and FAISS for production vector search — benchmarks, costs, and trade-offs.

item.title: Infrastructure as Code for ML: Terraform Patterns That Scale
item.description: Battle-tested Terraform modules for GPU clusters, model registries, and auto-scaling inference endpoints.

item.title: Fine-Tuning LLMs on a Budget: LoRA, QLoRA, and Beyond
item.description: Practical guide to fine-tuning large language models when you don't have unlimited GPU budgets.
